# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover handcrafted sourdough bread baked fresh daily. From classic loaves to chocolate sourdough, experience authentic artisan quality delivered to your door.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet the passionate bakers behind your favorite sourdough loaves. Learn how traditional techniques and quality ingredients create bread worth celebrating.

### Bake Notes
https://example.com/bake-notes
Unlock sourdough secrets with expert baking notes, seasonal recipes, and insider tips. Master chocolate sourdough, sandwich loaves, and more delicious creations.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready for exceptional sourdough? Get in touch to place orders, ask questions, or arrange delivery. Your next perfect loaf is just a message away.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Baked by Dev

### Cart
https://example.com/cart
Your Cart

### Checkout
https://example.com/checkout
Checkout

### Login
https://example.com/login
Customer Login

### Account
https://example.com/account
My Account

### Order Success
https://example.com/order-success
Thank you for your order

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Baked by Dev

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Baked by Dev
